data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. ROCKY BELL turned in a fair run last time from an unfavourable draw finishing fourth by 2.75 lengths (18.20). Should bounce back. 2. JUST TOO EASY has mixed form recently, finishing sixth (17.95) in a Grade 5 at this track latest but did run well two back when in the frame. Can find the frame this time. 3. ROCKY GALVIN doesn't have the best strike-rate. Better run when finding the frame last time though, finishing third (18.30) at this track. Form at the trip sound including two wins. Expected to feature again. 7. TINY MISTRESS gets a chance to redeem an unplaced effort here last start.","runners":[1,2,3,7],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: TAREE-R11-Fav Out
